item.title: Apple cheddar grilled cheese with delicious, caramelized onion
item.description: The perfect complement to the onions and apple. serve it with honeynut squash soup for ultimate coziness.

media:content.media:title: Apple cheddar grilled cheese with delicious, caramelized onion
media:content.media:description: The perfect complement to the onions and apple. serve it with honeynut squash soup for ultimate coziness.

item.title: Hailey Bieber Strawberry Glaze Skin Smoothie
item.description: This is a recipe for the famous Hailey Bieber Strawberry Glaze Skin Smoothie from Erewhon grocery. It is viral and famous for a reason: coconut cream, avocado, strawberry and loaded with collagen and sea moss for a delicious smoothie. Make it at home for a fraction of the price!

media:content.media:title: Hailey Bieber Strawberry Glaze Skin Smoothie
media:content.media:description: This is a recipe for the famous Hailey Bieber Strawberry Glaze Skin Smoothie from Erewhon grocery. It is viral and famous for a reason: coconut cream, avocado, strawberry and loaded with collagen and sea moss for a delicious smoothie. Make it at home for a fraction of the price!

item.title: Lasagna for Two
item.description: lasagna for two! two thicc pieces of lasagna…plus the perfect amount of leftovers (just a slice).

media:content.media:title: Lasagna for Two
media:content.media:description: lasagna for two! two thicc pieces of lasagna…plus the perfect amount of leftovers (just a slice).

item.title: Homemade Teriyaki Chicken Recipe
item.description: Make this Teriyaki Chicken for a quick, savory and filling weeknight dinner. This can be made in less than 30 minutes when you prep the Homemade Teriyaki Sauce ahead of time. Serve this with broccoli and rice!

media:content.media:title: Homemade Teriyaki Chicken Recipe
media:content.media:description: Make this Teriyaki Chicken for a quick, savory and filling weeknight dinner. This can be made in less than 30 minutes when you prep the Homemade Teriyaki Sauce ahead of time. Serve this with broccoli and rice!

item.title: Best Breakfast Meal Prep: Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches
item.description: These Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches are the thing to meal prep for busy mornings. These are filled with homemade maple sage chicken sausage patties, light and fluffy egg and a slice of cheddar cheese. Reheat these in the oven, microwave or airfryer for easy mornings.

media:content.media:title: Best Breakfast Meal Prep: Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches
media:content.media:description: These Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches are the thing to meal prep for busy mornings. These are filled with homemade maple sage chicken sausage patties, light and fluffy egg and a slice of cheddar cheese. Reheat these in the oven, microwave or airfryer for easy mornings.
